title: Brazilian iron ore flows to China
section_path: Brazilian iron ore flows to China
section_path_text: Brazilian iron ore flows to China
summary:
Main
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-03-07 10.11.08.png | assets/2024-03-07_brazilian-iron-ore-flows-to-china_img_screenshot2024-03-07101108_4b35ee3fd1f8.png
The onset of March has brought firmness in freight rates not only for large vessel size categories but also for smaller ones, with the Handysize NOPAC Far East route recording remarkable increases from the previous month. Meanwhile, in the Capesize Brazil to N China route, rates have reached the highest point for the year at $23/ton at the week's outset. However, the sustainability of this upward trend remains uncertain as the Chinese economic environment continues to grapple with significant challenges.
